SCAN_FAILED.title: Media scan failed
SCAN_FAILED.message: An error occurred while scanning the media folder.

PREFLIGHT_BLOCKED.title: Preflight failed
PREFLIGHT_BLOCKED.message: Please fix the environment issues above before running.

VENV_NOT_INITIALIZED.title: Python virtualenv not ready
VENV_NOT_INITIALIZED.message: Please create the virtualenv before running (dependencies install automatically — a few hundred MB).

VENV_INIT_FAILED.title: Virtualenv creation failed
VENV_INIT_FAILED.message: Could not create the bundled Python virtual environment. See the Console for details.

TRANSCRIPTION_FAILED.title: Transcription failed
TRANSCRIPTION_FAILED.message: The transcription job for the current file failed.

RUNNER_PAUSE_FAILED.title: Cannot pause transcription
RUNNER_PAUSE_FAILED.message: Unable to pause the current transcription on this platform or there is no active job.

RUNNER_RESUME_FAILED.title: Cannot resume transcription
RUNNER_RESUME_FAILED.message: Unable to resume the current transcription because no paused job was found.

RUNNER_SKIP_FAILED.title: Cannot skip current file
RUNNER_SKIP_FAILED.message: No active transcription is available to skip.

BUNDLED_PYTHON_NOT_FOUND.title: Python 3 not found
BUNDLED_PYTHON_NOT_FOUND.message: No system Python 3 interpreter is available to bootstrap the venv. Please install Python 3.10+ or set one in Settings.

MEDIA_ROOT_NOT_FOUND.title: Media Directory missing
MEDIA_ROOT_NOT_FOUND.message: The configured media folder does not exist. Please choose another.

INPUT_FILE_VANISHED.title: Input file no longer exists
INPUT_FILE_VANISHED.message: The audio file was moved, renamed, or deleted during transcription: {{path}}

toast.retryRunBlocked: Cannot retry now — fix the environment or queue first.
toast.retryScanBlocked: Cannot re-scan now — check the media folder setting.
toast.openFolderMissing: No folder or file path available to open.
toast.actionHandlerFailed: An unexpected error occurred while handling this action.

MODEL_CHECK_FAILED.title: Cannot check model status
MODEL_CHECK_FAILED.message: Could not verify whether the selected model is downloaded. Please make sure the Python virtual environment is set up, or check the Models tab manually.
